title: Effect Extractor
description: Extract your active potion effects into real vanilla potions — at a cost.
body:
🧪 Advanced Effect Extractor

The Advanced Effect Extractor allows players to convert their currently active potion effects into real vanilla potions.

But power comes with a price.

⚙️ How It Works

Right-click while having active potion effects

Requires Glass Bottles in your inventory

Consumes:

1 Glass Bottle

1 durability use

50% of your current health (configurable)

Removes your active effects

Creates a real vanilla potion containing those effects

Potion color is dynamically generated based on the stored effects

🩸 Risk & Balance

Drains 50% of your current health (can kill you)

Has durability (configurable)

Has cooldown (configurable)

Survival-balanced crafting recipe

Does nothing if:

You have no effects

You have no glass bottles

🎨 Features

Dynamic potion color based on effects

Blood-style particle effect

Server compatible

English & Spanish localization

Informative tooltips

Custom crafting recipe (Iron, Bottle, Iron Block)

Custom advancements
🛠 Crafting Recipe

Iron Ingot (bottom-left)
Glass Bottle (center)
Iron Block (top-right)

🌍 Multiplayer Compatible

Fully server-side compatible.
Works in singleplayer and multiplayer.
